name: Wolfspeed, Inc.
description: Wolfspeed, Inc. is a global leader in the manufacture of wide bandgap semiconductors, focusing on Silicon Carbide (SiC) and Gallium Nitride (GaN) materials and devices. The company provides industry-leading solutions for efficient energy consumption and high-speed transmission, catering to sectors such as electric vehicles, fast charging, 5G, and renewable energy. Formerly known as Cree, Inc., Wolfspeed has transitioned into a pure-play semiconductor powerhouse, leveraging decades of expertise to drive the global transition from silicon to Silicon Carbide technology.
